zh.lifeSummary: 當Josceline de Porhoet於從大約1021年到1036年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林時，他的父親Guethenoc de Porhoet28歲，母親Allarum de Cornouaille47歲。他和Avicia de Rennes至少有5個兒子。他去世於1074年在他的家鄉，埋葬在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Josceline de Porhoet于从大约1021年到1036年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林时，他的父亲Guethenoc de Porhoet28岁，母亲Allarum de Cornouaille47岁。他和Avicia de Rennes至少有5个儿子。他去世于1074年在他的家乡，埋葬在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Josceline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Jocelyn   as a girl's name.

variants.name: Jocelyn
meanings: Now normally a girl's name, but in earlier times more often given to boys. It is a transferred use of the English surname, which in turn is derived from an Old French masculine personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans in the form Joscelin. This was originally a derivative, Gautzelin, of the name of a Germanic tribe, the Gauts. The spelling of the first syllable was altered because the name was taken as a double diminutive (with the Old French suffixes -el and -in) of Josce ( see Joyce ).

en.lifeSummary: When Josceline de Porhoet was born from about 1021 to 1036, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Guethenoc de Porhoet, was 28 and his mother, Allarum de Cornouaille, was 47. He had at least 5 sons with Avicia de Rennes. He died in 1074, in his hometown, and was buried in Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Josceline de Porhoet est né du environ 1021 au 1036, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Guethenoc de Porhoet, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Allarum de Cornouaille, avait 47 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Avicia de Rennes. Il est décédé en 1074, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Josceline de Porhoet von um 1021 bis 1036 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guethenoc de Porhoet 28 und seine Mutter Allarum de Cornouaille 47. Er hatte mit Avicia de Rennes mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1074 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Josceline de Porhoet è nato il da circa 1021 a 1036 nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Guethenoc de Porhoet, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Allarum de Cornouaille, aveva 47 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Avicia de Rennes. Morì nel 1074, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Josceline de Porhoetがから約1021年まで1036年にフランスブレタグンモービハンジョセリンで生まれた時，父Guethenoc de Porhoetは28歳，母Allarum de Cornouailleは47歳であった。彼はAvicia de Rennesとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1074年に故郷で死去し，フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Josceline de Porhoet(이)가 대략 1021년 부터 1036년 까지 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guethenoc de Porhoet(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Allarum de Cornouaille(은)는 47세였다. 그는 Avicia de Rennes(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1074년 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 레던에 묻혔다.

lv.from about 1021 to 1036–1074: no ap 1021. gada līdz 1036. gadam–1074. gads

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Josceline de Porhoet nasceu de aproximadamente 1021 a 1036, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Guethenoc de Porhoet, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Allarum de Cornouaille, tinha 47 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Avicia de Rennes. Ele faleceu em 1074, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Josceline de Porhoet родился с около 1021 по 1036 в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guethenoc de Porhoet было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Allarum de Cornouaille, 47. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Avicia de Rennes. Он умер в 1074 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности редон, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Josceline de Porhoet nació desde aproximadamente 1021 hasta 1036, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Guethenoc de Porhoet, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Allarum de Cornouaille, tenía 47 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Avicia de Rennes. Murió en 1074, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Redon, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.
